3011140.name: The Last E.L.I.T.E.s
3011140.description:
The Last E.L.I.T.E.s

"In a world where shadows hide the most dangerous threats, one agent steps into the darkness."

You are Agent Adrian Thompson, a former Navy SEAL recruited into E.L.I.T.E. Division, a covert agency operating outside government control. For years, E.L.I.T.E. has dismantled terrorist networks, toppled cartels, and stopped global threats without ever being seen.

But power breeds corruption. As the agency begins to fracture from within, the world edges closer to chaos. Every mission, every decision, will determine whether you restore balance… or watch everything burn.

Features

Story Mode

  • Choice-driven narrative - Your decisions shape missions, alliances, and the fate of the world.

  • Immersive realism - Weapons, equipment, and environments tailored to the story, no out-of-place abilities.

  • High stakes missions - From covert infiltrations to explosive firefights, every operation feels alive.

Online Mode

  • Hostage Rescue – Either rescue hostages or prevent the opposing team from securing them.

  • Team Deathmatch & Ranked TDM – Engage in classic team-based combat with the objective to eliminate the opposing team.

  • Bodyguard – Protect or eliminate a high value asset/target.

  • Seasonal Events – Limited-time modes and rewards during special events.

  • Realism – The Last E.L.I.T.E.s focuses on realistic gameplay mechanics and visuals.

  • Minimal User Interface – A limited or toggleable interface to keep the experience immersive.

  • Proximity Voice Chat (Vivox) – Communicate with allies and rivals within hearing range for added strategic depth.

  • (Seasonal Events) – Participate in special events like Halloween or Christmas with unique challenges and bonuses.

Weapons & Equipment (Online)

  • M4A1 – Versatile and reliable, the go-to weapon for many players.

  • E.L.I.T.E.-Issued Pistols 1 & 2 – Agency-crafted sidearms with enhanced performance.

  • AK Variant – Powerful and effective, a classic for any intense encounter.

  • Grenades, flashbangs, jammers, and wall sensors – Tools for tactical play.

  • E.L.I.T.E. Tac Tablet – Provides intel on teammate locations, keeping everyone in sync.

  • Surveillance Drone, Airstrikes & more – Powerful abilities to change the battlefield.

And more firearms and equipment to unlock and experiment with as you play.

(Story mode balances gear and tools for immersion — no multiplayer-style abilities.)

Justice or Revenge

Justice restores balance, guided by principles and fairness. Revenge, fueled by personal vendetta, continues the cycle. One builds a future, the other, a cycle. Both are powerful, but only one can heal.

When the time comes... What will you choose?

Infinity Productions AB

We’re Infinity Productions, a small but dedicated Swedish studio founded by teenage developers with one goal:

to create games we would want to play ourselves.

We’re driven by passion, creativity, and a shared vision, to deliver impactful, high-quality experiences that resonate worldwide. The Last E.L.I.T.E.s is just the beginning.

💬 Join the community on Discord and help shape the fight for the future of E.L.I.T.E.

Game Quickie!

Write your story!

Every choice you make shapes the story, impacting both immediate outcomes and long-term consequences. As you navigate complex missions and make critical decisions, you’ll experience multiple story paths, each with unique outcomes that affect the world and the characters around you.

Online Mode

In The Last E.L.I.T.E.s online mode, players can join forces or compete against others in a thrilling, high-stakes environment. Engage in co-op missions with friends, where teamwork and strategy are key to overcoming challenging objectives, or test your skills in competitive modes that pit your tactical abilities against other agents worldwide.

Ranked Online Mode brings another level of intensity and strategy for players seeking a true test of their skills. Climb the ranks as you face off against other agents in high-stakes missions. As you advance, you'll encounter tougher opponents and gain access to exclusive rewards and achievements that showcase your progression. With each season, leaderboards are reset, giving players the chance to earn a spot among the top agents, secure rare customizations, and leave their mark on the world of E.L.I.T.E.

Are you ready for the challenge? Don't forget to join our discord!
